info.title: pathtool
info.description: A tool for managing PATH environment variables

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A simple tool to manage the PATH environment variable

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all paths in the user or system PATH environment variable

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a path to the user or system PATH environment variable

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path to add to be added to the PATH environment variable

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save the current PATH environment variable to a file, enter name of file without extension

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: The file to save the PATH environment variable to

commands.name: find
commands.description: Find paths containing a certain string

arguments.name: searchString
arguments.description: The string to search for in paths

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path to add to be added to the PATH environment variable

commands.name: gitunix
commands.description: Ensure git is in PATH and add Unix tools path if not present
